source_pr.title: core: support left join and right join for join reorder
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. core: Support left join and right join for join reorder

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #19940

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:

How it Works:

### Related changes

- PR to update `pingcap/docs`/`pingcap/docs-cn`:
- Need to cherry-pick to the release branch

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test
- Integration test
- Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- No code

Side effects

- Performance regression
    - Consumes more CPU
    - Consumes more MEM
- Breaking backward compatibility

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- Support left join and right join for join reorder<!-- Please write a release note here to describe the change you made when it is released to the users of TiDB. If your PR doesn't involve any change to TiDB(like test enhancements, RFC proposals...), you can write `No release note`. -->

symptoms: - c.Skip("skip race test") | // tk.MustExec("prepare stmt from 'select * from IDT_MULTI15858STROBJSTROBJ where col2 <> ? and col1 not in (?, ?, ?) or col3 = ? order by 2;';") (executor/explainfor_test.go)
failure_signature: - c.Skip("skip race test") | // tk.MustExec("prepare stmt from 'select * from IDT_MULTI15858STROBJSTROBJ where col2 <> ? and col1 not in (?, ?, ?) or col3 = ? order by 2;';") (executor/explainfor_test.go)
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: - c.Skip("skip race test") | // tk.MustExec("prepare stmt from 'select * from IDT_MULTI15858STROBJSTROBJ where col2 <> ? and col1 not in (?, ?, ?) or col3 = ? order by 2;';") (executor/explainfor_test.go)
